testcase.name: shouldRejectRequestWithInvalidSignature

Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\denni\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.5\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.5.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: shouldAcceptRequestWithValidSignature
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-14T20:40:53.015-03:00 DEBUG 7124 --- [poc-pos] [ main] [ ] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.poc.pos.interfaces.api.TransactionController#authorize(AuthorizeRequest) 2026-04-14T20:40:53.123-03:00 DEBUG 7124 --- [poc-pos] [ main] [ ] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Read "application/json;charset=UTF-8" to [AuthorizeRequest[transactionId=tx-1, terminalId=term-1, nsu=nsu-1, amount=10.00]] 2026-04-14T20:40:53.277-03:00 DEBUG 7124 --- [poc-pos] [ main] [ ] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json] 2026-04-14T20:40:53.288-03:00 DEBUG 7124 --- [poc-pos] [ main] [ ] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [AuthorizeResponse[transactionId=tx-1, terminalId=term-1, nsu=nsu-1, amount=10.00, status=AUTHORIZED]]
